session_summary: Fixed use_css composable (array values, SSR hydration, dead code), created Grid.vue, code reviews of Flex/Grid/use_css
user_goals: Fix array values processing in use_css (gap: [4, 2])
Fix SSR hydration conflict (remove insertRule, use useHead only)
Create Grid.vue component matching Flex.vue pattern
Fix useHead called multiple times (singleton flag)
Fix Css_Rule type for pseudo autocomplete
key_decisions: Array values no longer treated as Css_Rule objects — separate Array.isArray check added
get_css_value restructured: number → rem/unitless, string → as-is, array → get_rem(map)
insertRule + get_style_sheet removed — useHead only, no client-side DOM mutation
css_text changed from computed(() => Object.values(...).join()) to useState with manual += append
useHead called once via module-level head_injected flag, not per-component
Css_Rule split into Css_Base_Rule & Css_Pseudo_Rule for TS autocomplete
basis, grow, shrink, flex removed from Flex.vue (flex-item, not container properties)
align/justify props renamed to snake_case in Flex.vue
Grid.vue mirrors Flex.vue pattern with grid-specific properties
build is NOT reliable for error checking (can build error page)
critical_constraints: Never use bun run build as error check
Do not add emojis unless asked
Never fabricate facts, paths, package names
